headline: J. M. Smucker Tests Brand Power With Milk Bone Supergirl Krypto Treats
summary: J. M. Smucker (NYSE:SJM) has launched limited-edition Milk-Bone Krypto Soft & Chewy Mini Treats in collaboration with Warner Bros. The product is tied to the Supergirl film and its dog character, Krypto, and is available for a limited time. For J. M. Smucker, pet food and treats sit alongside coffee and spreads as key parts of its branded consumer portfolio, and competition in pet treats remains intense. A tie-in between Milk-Bone and a major entertainment franchise reflects how companies...
